summary: Inspector Vogel confronts Count Caliger Franz, who had betrayed him in the past and cut off one of his arms. Inspector Vogel is no longer afraid of Count Caliger, but instead taunts him about his own son's fate. The conversation reveals a complex history between the two characters, with deep-seated emotions and animosity.
key_moments: Inspector Vogel confronts Count Caliger Franz
Count Caliger Franz is revealed to have cut off one of Inspector Vogel's arms in the past
Inspector Vogel taunts Count Caliger about his own son's fate
